author: y4rr
content:
Result: Added 9 conformance tests for UNet in conformance_vision_models.rs:
- unet_output_shape_1class_32x32, _21class_64x64, _batch2_32x32, _minimum_spatial: shape contract [B,3,H,W]->[B,num_classes,H,W]
- unet_forward_backward_gradient_finite: all input grads finite after backward
- unet_gradient_nonzero_on_params: at least one param has nonzero grad (no dead sub-graphs)
- unet_snapshot_deterministic_output: two forward passes produce bit-identical output
- unet_snapshot_output_finite: all output values finite (no NaN/Inf)
Also added make_chw_pattern helper for deterministic test inputs.
Extended regenerate_vision_fixtures.py with unet_output_shape_*, unet_snapshot_determinism, unet_gradient_finite fixtures.
45/45 conformance tests pass, clippy -D warnings clean.
